B.text: stops and builds up in front of the car

C.text: splits and flows over the roof and under the car

D.text: only moves straight up into the sky

parsed.answer_value: splits and flows over the roof and under the car
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows airflow patterns around the car, with air splitting at the front. The air flows over the roof and under the car, as indicated by the color gradients and flow lines. There is no evidence of air stopping or only moving in one direction. The split flow pattern is clearly depicted in the image.
